title: pinaceae
intro: The Pinaceae rank is a family of coniferous trees and shrubs that includes pines, spruces, firs, cedars, and cypresses. This family is characterized by needle-like or scale-like leaves and cones that produce seeds. Pinaceae are found on all continents except Antarctica and are often used as timber or ornamental plants. The family includes over 200 species, ranging from small shrubs to large, tall trees.
